intro:
There is no plant known as Angorkis megalorrhiza. However, I found a plant called Angostura bark (Angostura trifoliata, also known as Guayacan, or Angostura megalorrhiza)  which is a plant species from the Guayacan genus. 

Here is a paragraph on the plant Angostura megalorrhiza:

 Angostura megalorrhiza is a plant species that belongs to the Guayacan genus and is traditionally used as a medicinal plant. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, terpenes, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Angostura megalorrhiza is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and fever.
